tv.generator-info-name: WebGrab+Plus/w MDB & REX Postprocess -- version V5.2.0.0 -- Jan van Straaten

programme.title: Aunty Lee's Deadly Delights
programme.desc: Alarm bells ring when Aunty Lee realises Nina may be falling for a love scam but convincing a smitten Nina is another challenge altogether.

programme.title: Fire Country S1
programme.desc: After Bode requests to be transferred to a different city, his future in Edgewater hangs in the balance. Meanwhile, the crew joins forces to protect the town from a treacherous storm.

programme.title: Wheel Of Fortune S42
programme.desc: Ryan Seacrest takes over as the new host for the well-loved gameshow.

programme.title: Raid The Cage: Season 02
programme.desc: Two teams of two compete to take prizes from the Cage before the time limit expires and the doors close. Correct answers adds seconds to the clock, allowing to claim more rewards from the Cage. The winning team keeps what they grabbed.

programme.title: The Chase S16
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh and his criminally clever Chaser are back for yet another battle of the brains - can our contestants beat the Chaser, or will it be just another day at the office?

programme.title: Films & Stars
programme.desc: Films and Stars cover the hottest events from the big screen every week.

programme.title: Long Weekends
programme.desc: We're back for another Long Weekends adventure! 3D2N in Luang Prabang, Laos ziplining over waterfalls, cruising the Mekong, and making our own jewellery all while trying to stay under budget. Can we make the most out of Laos without breaking the bank? Let's find out!

programme.title: Lion Mums S3
programme.desc: As Winston spends more time with Spencer, he finally realises the value of his friendship and his new educational landscape. There are awkward moments between lovebirds Beng Hian and Chae Lian who might try to take the next step... Another fight ensues as Durrani has a huge quarrel with Nabilah, and she grows suspicious - something is not right with her daughter...

programme.title: Supa Strikas Rookie Season
programme.desc: The origin story of star striker, Shakes, and how he made it to the world's greatest soccer team, the Supa Strikas.

programme.title: Slugterra S2
programme.desc: Slugterra is an epic sci-fi comedy adventure set deep underground, where the ammo's alive and only the quick survive! In this luminous, high-tech, underground world every cavern holds a new adventure, new battle and weird little slugs to be discovered!

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S28
programme.desc: Get ready for more adventures with Thomas the Number One Engine and his loc-amigos in Sodor!

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S28
programme.desc: Get ready for more adventures with Thomas the Number One Engine and his loc-amigos in Sodor!

programme.title: Meekah Visits
programme.desc: Meekah exercises her body and mind at Munchkin's Indoor Playground! She plays a fun Matching Game that leads her to all sorts of play areas like a Doctor's Office, a Fire Station, and even a huge ball pit!

programme.title: Meekah Visits
programme.desc: Meekah exercises her body and mind at Munchkin's Indoor Playground! She plays a fun Matching Game that leads her to all sorts of play areas like a Doctor's Office, a Fire Station, and even a huge ball pit!

programme.title: Ollie And Friends 5
programme.desc: Ollie and Cherry teach Sloppy how to bake cookies. When Sloppy goes into a cookie frenzy, the gang venture into the wild to find him some circular and healthy treats. Ollie enters a go-kart race but realises that his go-kart is in pretty bad shape! With the help of Cherry and Sloppy, the three of them get the go-kart ready for the race.

programme.title: Pinkfong Songs & Stories
programme.desc: Join Pinkfong and friends for more fun and adventure.

programme.title: Sesame Street S55
programme.desc: The season's main curricular goals are mindfulness and expressing one's feelings.

programme.title: Andy's Global Adventures
programme.desc: In his latest set of adventures, Andy travels to all corners of the globe, meeting an amazing new cast of animals - from chameleons in Sri Lanka to emperor penguins in Antarctica. Accompanied by tech wizard Jen and new information-seeking AI Scout, Andy travels the globe in a hi-tech expedition truck, a scientific research station that houses Jen's database of incredible facts about fauna and flora that inhabit our planet.

programme.title: Andy's Global Adventures
programme.desc: In his latest set of adventures, Andy travels to all corners of the globe, meeting an amazing new cast of animals - from chameleons in Sri Lanka to emperor penguins in Antarctica. Accompanied by tech wizard Jen and new information-seeking AI Scout, Andy travels the globe in a hi-tech expedition truck, a scientific research station that houses Jen's database of incredible facts about fauna and flora that inhabit our planet.

programme.title: Lil Wild S2
programme.desc: Pixel gloats over the captive white tiger in her secret HQ bunker and revels in her masterplan to control wild animals with her technology. Unbeknownst to Suzie, Pixel launches new experimental tech that enables her to control the minds of animals at the park. The experiment goes wrong, instead turning them into zombified versions of their former selves. As the only ones unaffected by the tech, it's all up to Rara and Jai to save their friends and their home.

programme.title: Lil Wild S2
programme.desc: Pixel gloats over the captive white tiger in her secret HQ bunker and revels in her masterplan to control wild animals with her technology. Unbeknownst to Suzie, Pixel launches new experimental tech that enables her to control the minds of animals at the park. The experiment goes wrong, instead turning them into zombified versions of their former selves. As the only ones unaffected by the tech, it's all up to Rara and Jai to save their friends and their home.

programme.title: HSBC Women's World Championship 2026
programme.desc: HSBC Women's World Championship 2026.

programme.title: Wheel Of Fortune S42
programme.desc: Ryan Seacrest takes over as the new host for the well-loved gameshow.

programme.title: Aunty Lee's Deadly Delights
programme.desc: Alarm bells ring when Aunty Lee realises Nina may be falling for a love scam but convincing a smitten Nina is another challenge altogether.

programme.title: Lion Mums S3
programme.desc: The clock ticks and the might of the Lion Mums and Dads comes roaring to the fore as they rush to save Nabilah from the claws of a predator. Nabilah's experience causes a shift in the ways the mothers reconsider their priorities for their children. As Durrani and Reza work together for Nabilah's recovery, they receive help from an unlikely source. At the same time, a reunion of sorts bring out hidden secrets for Chae Lian and Beng Hian.

programme.title: Long Weekends
programme.desc: This time, we're heading to Miri, Sarawak! From trekking through ancient caves to discovering hidden perfume bars and trying their authentic Sarawak Cake Lapis, this underrated Borneo city packs a punch. Can we uncover the best eats, sights, and experiences all without going over 600? Watch till the end to see if Miri deserves a spot on your weekend getaway list!

programme.title: Just For Laughs Gags S24
programme.desc: Just For Laughs will tickle everyone's funny bone with its hilarious practical jokes, hidden camera pranks, and other creative hijinks.

programme.title: The Chase S16
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh and his criminally clever Chaser are back for yet another battle of the brains - can our contestants beat the Chaser, or will it be just another day at the office?

programme.title: Wheel Of Fortune S42
programme.desc: Ryan Seacrest takes over as the new host for the well-loved gameshow.

programme.title: Britain's Got Talent Series 18
programme.desc: Britain's Got Talent 2025, the 18th series, will feature Ant and Dec returning as hosts and Simon Cowell, Amanda Holden, Alesha Dixon, and Bruno Tonioli as judges. The series will include a variety of acts vying for the chance to perform at the Royal Variety Performance and win a 250,000 prize.

programme.title: Aunty Lee's Deadly Delights
programme.desc: Determined to expose the truth, Aunty Lee and the gang set a trap to lure Nina's mysterious online suitor to the restaurant only to learn that catching a scammer is trickier than expected.

programme.title: News Tonight With Highlights From Parliament
programme.desc: (Live) The daily evening-news programme featuring highlights and coverage of both local and international news with a local perspective.

programme.title: Talking Point
programme.desc: In Part 2, Steven Chia investigates if women really are bad drivers and find out if Steven passed his driving test!

programme.title: FBI S7
programme.desc: A series of copycat killings forces Maggie to seek help from the serial slasher she put behind bars.

programme.title: FBI: International S4
programme.desc: Agents of the FBI's International Divison are tasked with neutralising potential threats and protecting American citizens.

programme.title: Marry Me
programme.desc: Music superstars Kat Valdez and Bastian are getting married before a global audience of fans. But when Kat learns, seconds before her vows, that Bastian has been unfaithful, she instead decides to marry Charlie, a stranger in the crowd.

programme.title: Aunty Lee's Deadly Delights
programme.desc: Aunty Lee turns matchmaker when an old friend begs for help marrying off her son before he turns thirty lest disaster strike, according to superstition.

programme.title: Fire Country S1
programme.desc: The crew engages in a search and rescue mission after a building collapses and Division Chief Sharon is forced to make a gut-wrenching decision.

programme.title: Wheel Of Fortune S42
programme.desc: Ryan Seacrest takes over as the new host for the well-loved gameshow.

programme.title: Lingo USA S2
programme.desc: In this game show, hosted by the iconic RuPaul, the simplest of words could be worth thousands of dollars. Lingo is the fast paced word-play game that keeps on innovating for new audiences, with its mix of skill, tension, humour and the chance to win big cash prizes. Teams are pitted against each other in a battle to fill in the blanks and find words.

programme.title: The Chase S16
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh and his criminally clever Chaser are back for yet another battle of the brains - can our contestants beat the Chaser, or will it be just another day at the office?

programme.title: Euromaxx
programme.desc: Everything you've ever wanted to know about Europe - from traditions and habits to culture shocks and record breakers.

programme.title: Long Weekends
programme.desc: We're back with a quick getaway to Penang, Malaysia this time! Watch to find out all the yummy food spots we uncovered in Penang, and see if Sonia manages to hold on for her dear life on the donut boat ride while singing her favourite song!!

programme.title: 流水迢迢
programme.desc: 月落城少城主萧无瑕忍辱负重潜伏梁国多年化名为卫昭背负佞臣骂名卫昭为查清当年家族真相试图掳走齐王案的唯一活口但自己精心布置的计划却被突然出现的少女江慈所破坏裴琰趁机将重伤的江慈养入府中以求找到幕后破坏者而卫昭的悲惨身世和民族大义也触动了天真烂漫的江慈二人在相处中看到了彼此的闪光点互生情愫最终卫昭江慈裴琰三人放下私人恩怨共同对抗梁帝谢澈实现了守护月落建立清明天下的愿望.

programme.title: 永夜星河
programme.desc: 讲述了鬼马少女凌妙妙不小心误入小说任务系统中为了回归现实世界必须完成系统派发的任务与慕声慕瑶柳拂衣一起捉妖打怪升级一步步化解人妖两族恩怨的故事.

programme.title: 加里加尔宫
programme.desc: 您是否曾经在东海岸看过一栋气质非凡充满神秘色彩吸引众人目光的白色建筑物它就是在20世纪初建造经历过无数风雨至今仍屹立不倒的加里加尔宫古老的房子里究竟发生过什么谁曾经拥有它并爱惜它让屋内充满欢歌笑语愉悦的气息在四面墙之间回荡谁之后又强行占有它将它过去的富丽堂皇剥光剩下一片狼藉.

programme.title: 双天至尊III
programme.desc: 转瞬间其芳和言飞以分局3年.

programme.title: 双天至尊III
programme.desc: 其芳透露言飞打算举行新秀赌王大赛获胜者将成为赌场的接班人届时他们一家人将一起离开珊瑚岛.

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 本剧以1960年代至1970年代的九份地区为背景述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下藉由上一代的爱情故事串连与第二代之间共同的情感与记忆深度探索两代之间的价值观差异.

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 本剧以1960年代至1970年代的九份地区为背景述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下藉由上一代的爱情故事串连与第二代之间共同的情感与记忆深度探索两代之间的价值观差异.

programme.title: 黄金年华之斗歌竞艺
programme.desc: 年过半百的乐龄人士在为家庭和事业奉献多年后终于迎来了人生的新篇章那些藏在心底的梦想如今将再次点亮舞台 新系列的节目将延续团战的形式为乐龄朋友们提供一个更多元更有趣的荣誉舞台让大家拥有同样的机会携手走到最后参赛者也可以一起展现真我切磋技艺以歌会友让生活更喜乐安康.

programme.title: 晚间新闻
programme.desc: 晚间新闻每日为您提供最全面的本地与全球新闻报道.

programme.title: 医生不是神
programme.desc: 含韵在医院撞见克伦意外克伦居然千里迢迢来找生父却迟迟不跟佳才相认佳才翻找了高中时期的年刊确认含韵就是学妹特地约她回到学校重温校园时光想跟她攀关系怎知含韵却抛下震撼弹暗示佳才他有个儿子.

programme.title: 迷茫又无惧的我们
programme.desc: 博明为诚正庆生送青蛙玩具志远却送安全套诚正遭分手又目睹梦静亲近他人冲突间安全套掉出被英敏看见愤怒之际诚正脱口说出她是母亲的身份香云成绩退步沉迷手机众人惊觉她竟是网红XYZ博明与冬溪游泳滑轮中情愫渐深起家醉酒打给冬溪称有秘密翌日醒来却只见博明在屋内.

programme.title: 狮城热话
programme.desc: 周一至周五晚上7点狮城有约谈话性栏目狮城热话以汇集多元声音及专家看法为目标通过网络投票和引导观点碰撞打造能让观众参与的时事舆论场.

programme.title: 企业强人
programme.desc: 赵恺打算借四百亿来让世代进行二次上市宋翘向赵恺开出世代必须裁员的融资条件赵恺拒绝文浩盘算向赵恺提议以敬图借壳上市届时启超便能成为世代的决策层.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop
programme.desc: Q'SAI 膝之助胶原蛋白粉 QSAI 护膝胶原蛋白粉截至2024年1月累计销量已超过5000万盒富含高吸收性的胶原蛋白肽玻尿酸和软骨素有助滋养关节和软骨缓解关节疼痛其无味无臭的粉末状配方可轻松加入任何食物或饮料中服用是日常关节护理的理想之选尤其适合那些不想服用药片的人士.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop
programme.desc: Tupperware 冷冻保鲜 5 件套让备餐和长期储存变得便捷有效锁住食物的新鲜度作为 Tupperware 畅销第一的冷冻容器它采用快速冷冻设计与柔韧材质冷冻后轻松脱模多种尺寸组合能轻松满足各种冷冻储存的需求.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop
programme.desc: NatureFarm's碧容健源自法国滨海松树皮萃取物是一款高效天然抗氧化营养品经过160项临床试验与450篇科学研究验证全面帮助抵御氧化压力守护大脑眼睛心脏关节肌肤及血糖健康适合各年龄层日常保健.

programme.title: 甘味人生
programme.desc: 甘味人生是一出阐述一家人世代传承家业的励志写实戏剧剧中赵家是制作传统手工酱油的一个大家庭家庭的父母兄弟姊妹共同为这个家努力打拼的历程为主轴描写刻画每个人在打拼的过程当中与纠结在矛盾的感情世界里所经历的悲欢喜乐.

programme.title: 甘味人生
programme.desc: 甘味人生是一出阐述一家人世代传承家业的励志写实戏剧剧中赵家是制作传统手工酱油的一个大家庭家庭的父母兄弟姊妹共同为这个家努力打拼的历程为主轴描写刻画每个人在打拼的过程当中与纠结在矛盾的感情世界里所经历的悲欢喜乐.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop
programme.desc: 轻巧省空间开箱即用安静运行减震护膝可调速度与坡度适合快走与慢跑折叠后薄至12公分轻松收纳床底或靠墙摆放让居家运动更轻松自在.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop
programme.desc: Naturalle 糖适宁茶采用 100 天然叶材精制而成包括匙羹藤桑叶与绿茶口感清淡低热量糖适宁茶是适合餐后饮用有助于抑制对甜食的渴望和维持血糖健康水平非常适合经常摄取高碳水或含糖食物的人士饮用.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop
programme.desc: Kinohimitsu燕窝采用纯手工挑毛与古法炖煮营养丰富助美容养颜增强体质恢复活力长白山人参燕窝饮补气强身缓解疲劳红枣枸杞燕窝饮促进气血循环令肌肤红润透亮.

programme.title: 一点新闻
programme.desc: (Live) 一点新闻为您提供更新的本地与全球新闻头条.

programme.title: 开心速递
programme.desc: 故事围绕着洪氏和龙氏家族他们的工作生活和朋友展开在之前的剧集中龙景峰的幽灵与洪氏家族成员结下了深厚的友谊.

programme.title: 开心速递
programme.desc: 故事围绕着洪氏和龙氏家族他们的工作生活和朋友展开在之前的剧集中龙景峰的幽灵与洪氏家族成员结下了深厚的友谊.

programme.title: 开心速递
programme.desc: 故事围绕着洪氏和龙氏家族他们的工作生活和朋友展开在之前的剧集中龙景峰的幽灵与洪氏家族成员结下了深厚的友谊.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop
programme.desc: 日本制造融合传统汉方智慧与现代科技严选中药及草本植物精华配方温和纯净天然无添加有助于调节血压血糖和胆固醇水平有助于促进血管通畅柔韧有弹性 日本制造有助于清除体内湿气平衡内气促进健康帮助消除水肿减少水肿.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop
programme.desc: 说再见脏地板迎接闪亮干净.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop
programme.desc: Philips Azur 8000系列蒸汽熨斗有OptimalTEMP免调校温控技术保证不会把面料烫坏智能温控保证不熨焦让您水平垂直熨烫一机搞定.

programme.title: 银色嘉年华 2025
programme.desc: 银色嘉年华走出户外一年六场大型活动与大家热烈互动节目设有五大单元健身养生乐龄故事健康资讯家传美食以及生活小妙招精采活动与内容将浓缩成每周一集电视节目与观众分享快乐与活力.

programme.title: 健康100错
programme.desc: 都市人越来越注重健康在现今资讯爆炸的年代普罗大众积极发掘各式各样的健康资讯而网络文章转发的真实经历孰真孰假也好最重要是开心Share 主持冯盈盈周奕玮搜罗坊间广为流传的健康谬误寻找最常弄错的健康常识.

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 本剧以1960年代至1970年代的九份地区为背景述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下藉由上一代的爱情故事串连与第二代之间共同的情感与记忆深度探索两代之间的价值观差异.

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 本剧以1960年代至1970年代的九份地区为背景述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下藉由上一代的爱情故事串连与第二代之间共同的情感与记忆深度探索两代之间的价值观差异.

programme.title: 狮城有约
programme.desc: (Live) 总结一天大小事关心属于你我的家园每逢星期一至五傍晚6.30-7.30pm与你相约.

programme.title: 企业强人
programme.desc: 文浩提议赵恺借壳敬图上市赵恺看出文浩另有所图而婉拒宋翘为赵恺引荐新加坡宏山基金融资世代佛山的集运站起火方芳赶往佛山.

programme.title: 世界独特社区
programme.desc: 日本富山县照护中心,老人小孩共处一室, 老和少相互陪伴如在家里生活一样是社区和家庭的传统照护方式丹麦共享社区是聚集私人住宅和共享设施与公共空间的居住理念透过共享方式解决家庭与日常生活上的负担.

programme.title: 迷茫又无惧的我们
programme.desc: 博明为保护冬溪隐瞒当年的事遭起家责备香云遭网络霸凌冬溪鼓励她起家向冬溪告白被拒博明尝试帮冬伟缓解皮肤问题却无效起家邀冬伟合作接大单冬溪虽表面支持却暗自担忧利用了起家诚正为被欺负的中一生打抱不平遭马厚道责备意外揭露英敏是他家长博明为冬溪准备晚餐忍不住亲吻她.

programme.title: 晚间新闻
programme.desc: (Live) 晚间新闻每日为您提供最全面的本地与全球新闻报道.

programme.title: 四海中医
programme.desc: 主持人黄橙子与嘉宾千里光Eric Brand从台湾高雄老药铺的药签文化出发见证中医药融入台湾人生老病死的日常在苗栗亲手炒制麻辣锅底探寻药香传统的养生智慧同时深入新北乌来品味原住民泰雅族人以马告山胡椒土肉桂入菜的药食哲学走访万华青草巷与新式茶吧体验古方结合个性化疗愈的创新从百年药房手工炮制的坚持到智能诊所将中医数据化的实践展现了台湾中医药在守正与创新之间的平衡勾勒出充满时光美学与人情温度的本草地图.

programme.title: 7天我可以
programme.desc: 要在7天内学会一门运动到底有可能吗7天我可以系列中新闻主播们拜访本地运动健儿挑战在一周内突破自己的体能极限完成运动员们设下的挑战.

programme.title: 永夜星河
programme.desc: 讲述了鬼马少女凌妙妙不小心误入小说任务系统中为了回归现实世界必须完成系统派发的任务与慕声慕瑶柳拂衣一起捉妖打怪升级一步步化解人妖两族恩怨的故事.

programme.title: 食尚玩家 S13
programme.desc: 在新一辑的食尚玩家 - 2 天1夜GO"里主持人纳豆六月曾子余等会带领观众周游许多耳目一新的地方国家包括韩国日本长崎福冈越南等.

programme.title: 双天至尊III
programme.desc: 言飞及时出现阻止言星与其芳赌命.

programme.title: 双天至尊III
programme.desc: 云九向言星示意他有把柄落在自己手中言星无奈终狠下心肠跟言飞一决胜负.

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 本剧以1960年代至1970年代的九份地区为背景述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下藉由上一代的爱情故事串连与第二代之间共同的情感与记忆深度探索两代之间的价值观差异.

programme.title: 爸妈备多分
programme.desc: 本集针对三组家庭进行了实境跟拍通过任务游戏了解孩子们拖拉的程度到底是孩子太慢还是父母太着急资深心理辅导师李志祥博士与主持人秋月一起剖析造成孩子慢吞吞的原因以及家长应如何帮助孩子改掉拖拉行为.

programme.title: 真的出现了!
programme.desc: (双声道 - 中/韩) 莲豆的弟弟吴栋旭和姪女吴秀谦意外发现莲豆怀孕的事急忙将此事告诉舅舅三人赶到补习班找莲豆问个清楚却撞见莲豆辞职的一幕.

programme.title: 真的出现了!
programme.desc: (双声道 - 中/韩) 孔知明对外装作和车贤宇感情不错但回到房间就吵架两人正想向家人宣布离婚消息时廉水晶却抢先宣布怀孕消息让两人再也不好意思开口.

programme.title: 收场
programme.desc: 收场.

programme.title: 收场
programme.desc: 收场.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop
programme.desc: 雪白保湿脸霜让你肌肤提升保湿力更显年轻.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop
programme.desc: Morries鸳鸯锅让你实现火锅自由创新G型双环加热管设计让热能分布均匀鸳鸯锅设计可同时享用两种不同汤底也可以一边烤肉一边煮汤2200W高功率确保快速沸腾左右独立温控系统让您精准调节加热温度套组附带可调节的无线桌面风扇.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop
programme.desc: 微电流电疗结合热敷功能帮助舒缓疼痛的好帮手哪里痛就贴哪里.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop
programme.desc: 日本制造融合传统汉方智慧与现代科技严选中药及草本植物精华配方温和纯净天然无添加有助于调节血压血糖和胆固醇水平有助于促进血管通畅柔韧有弹性 日本制造有助于清除体内湿气平衡内气促进健康帮助消除水肿减少水肿.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop
programme.desc: 厨房刀片如同专业大厨一般娴熟.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop
programme.desc: 搅拌后直接在同一个机器里料理的搅拌料理机还提供多功能模式.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop
programme.desc: 日常双效保养组合同时守护筋骨与视力筋骨丸采用日本贝类萃取钙鱼胶原蛋白与软骨素强化骨骼维持关节灵活亮目丸精选日本蓝莓胡萝卜与叶黄素帮助过滤蓝光缓解眼睛疲劳维持清晰视力天然配方每日补充让骨骼稳关节顺双眼更舒适.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop
programme.desc: 韩国电视购物频台爆款这万能布能有效地清理顽固的污渍 油脂和气味.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop
programme.desc: FEM & HOM 防脱发套组恢复头皮健康减少男女头发稀疏问题.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop
programme.desc: 全新上市专利 45 斜角刀片轻松粉碎水果冷冻食材与冰块完美保留食材原味倾斜漩涡设计让食材混合顺滑10 段速度随心调节轻调理杯可拆刀座清洗方便操作简单功能全面又时尚.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop
programme.desc: 一杯多用 茶水分离, 设计典雅的茶漏咖啡杯让你方便携带.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop
programme.desc: 奶蓟精华有助维护肝脏健康精神更佳皮肤更美哦.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop
programme.desc: Thomson ProbioGut 是一款优质的益生菌补充剂专为支持消化健康增强免疫力和促进整体健康而设计采用两种临床研究认证的日本益生菌菌株 有助于改善肠道菌群调节排便并维持健康的体重.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop
programme.desc: 说再见脏地板迎接闪亮干净.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop
programme.desc: Ellixi发量黑洗发水采用颠覆性的4合1配方洗头同时染发护发增发量并强韧发丝仅需5天即可改善头皮与发质采用韩国专利多酚技术无需染发剂或化学添加温和自然遮盖白发结合多酚氧化着色原理与草本养护成分让秀发一洗更黑更丰盈更健康.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop
programme.desc: Karihome Gold 成人羊奶粉口感顺滑富含易吸收的羊奶蛋白采用先进脱膻技术保留营养与纯净口感连肠胃敏感者都能安心饮用 还特别添加叶黄素胶原蛋白和 Omega-3支持眼睛关节及心脑血管健康每天两杯补钙增强免疫力适合全家饮用特别适合年长人士助力骨骼健康与活力.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop
programme.desc: 全套组合菜刀剪刀砧板让你下厨更轻松菜刀和剪刀附专业磨刀套.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop
programme.desc: Health+雪颜银耳 免煮即食只需1分钟即可享用100 纯天然有机银耳不添加防腐剂或化学添加剂.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop
programme.desc: ASD爱仕达316不锈钢不粘炒锅采用三层钢结构与耐高温不粘涂层结合了不锈钢的耐用与不粘锅的便捷蜂窝纹理设计省油防粘食材加热均匀不怕铁铲和钢丝球刮擦适合烹饪各种坚硬食材.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop
programme.desc: OMRON BP Monitor Atrial Fibrillation可同时测量血压并筛查心房攒动帮助提早测试到中风的迹象它方便家人或情侣共用能记录两个用户经过临床验证它能确保测量准确度让用户安心使用.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop
programme.desc: 生活过得好身体健康最重要阖家健康保健品为你加油打气.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop
programme.desc: 厨房必备组合Acerpure Aqua WP5 滤净水器搭配2合1翻转气炸锅理想组合健康又方便随时享用 99C 热水 / 5C 冷水水质纯净安全5合1 RO+双重UV杀菌翻转气炸锅可轻松实现 空气炸烤肉煮汤操作简单安全高效干净饮水与轻松烹饪一台搞定厨房大小事.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop
programme.desc: 一款无线高扭矩清洁器为轻松深层清洁而设计它可伸缩手柄与6种可替换刷头轻松清洁地板瓷砖浴缸及狭小角落简约奢华设计适合每个人使用.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop
programme.desc: 14 合 1 La Gourmet 高压锅使用蒸汽压力快速烹饪食物La Gourmet 玻璃空气炸锅通过循环热空气烹煮出酥脆又健康的美食.

programme.title: 进击的台湾 S8
programme.desc: 进击的台湾努力呈现出台湾社会各行各业小人物的故事透过这些平凡人对生活工作的态度让观众见证他们不凡的精采人生期望以此高品质又能激励人心的节目与台湾民众共同守护我们的一片净土.

programme.title: 台湾百味
programme.desc: 这个节目专门推荐台湾美食餐厅透过节目将台湾料理带给更多人认识以及餐馆背后动人故事.

programme.title: 第二任丈夫
programme.desc: (双声道 - 中/韩) 此剧讲述因无法停止的欲望酿成的悲剧令一个女人无辜地失去家人她在错综复杂的命运和爱情中展开复仇的故事.

programme.title: 天生一对 2
programme.desc: (双声道 - 中/泰) 溥丹来月事忘了古代没有卫生棉于是找佳拉洁求助璋巴夫人不希望溥丹嫁给理恩不断暗示溥丹不要高攀还叫佳拉洁请德特介绍对象给溥丹.

programme.title: 真的出现了!
programme.desc: (双声道 - 中/韩) 泰京为了母亲低声下气去向奶奶道歉奶奶仍坚持要他和世珍结婚泰京于是提议和世珍假结婚.

programme.title: 真的出现了!
programme.desc: (双声道 - 中/韩) 姜阿凤和儿子栋旭有意找俊河兴师问罪莲豆来不及阻拦只好拜托住同一个饭店的泰京帮忙阻拦.

programme.title: 众神之地
programme.desc: 相传当世界的第一缕阳光照耀在冈仁波齐便有了第一头牦牛藏族先民在刚刚登陆高原之时因无法立足求助于山神山神将野牦牛分成了两派一部分下山帮助藏民驮重物贡献自己的毛和奶成为如今的家牦牛另一部分继续留在山上保持着远古以来的生存习惯仍是野牦牛长久的繁衍令家牦牛的体型抗病能力都退化严重无法适应高原严寒的冬天牧民迫切需要找到改良种群基因的方法随着大量放牧人和野牦牛的距离越来越近问题也随之而来野牦牛虽然能帮助牧民改善家牦牛的基因但往往会带走一些家牦牛而家牦牛的基因又将会影响野牦牛基因的纯度家牦牛的疾病还会对野牦牛种群造成难以抵抗的打击这场博弈未来的结局究竟会如何没有人知道.

programme.title: 临江仙
programme.desc: 李青月为助白九思直面危险采取大胆行动.

programme.title: 晚间新闻
programme.desc: 晚间新闻每日为您提供最全面的本地与全球新闻报道.

programme.title: 众神之地
programme.desc: 相传当世界的第一缕阳光照耀在冈仁波齐便有了第一头牦牛藏族先民在刚刚登陆高原之时因无法立足求助于山神山神将野牦牛分成了两派一部分下山帮助藏民驮重物贡献自己的毛和奶成为如今的家牦牛另一部分继续留在山上保持着远古以来的生存习惯仍是野牦牛长久的繁衍令家牦牛的体型抗病能力都退化严重无法适应高原严寒的冬天牧民迫切需要找到改良种群基因的方法随着大量放牧人和野牦牛的距离越来越近问题也随之而来野牦牛虽然能帮助牧民改善家牦牛的基因但往往会带走一些家牦牛而家牦牛的基因又将会影响野牦牛基因的纯度家牦牛的疾病还会对野牦牛种群造成难以抵抗的打击这场博弈未来的结局究竟会如何没有人知道.

programme.title: 为何是吴秀才
programme.desc: (双声道 - 中/韩) 劇情講述因錯誤的選擇而夢想著走向錯誤的法學院女教授與一個曾經受冤入獄的法學院學生相戀並修正了自己的人生開啟一段心痛且心動的愛情故事.

programme.title: 酸咸鲜活
programme.desc: 咸酸辛鲜每一口都鲜活跳动欢迎来到亚洲发酵美食的精彩世界发酵不仅是保存食物的方式更是我们的味觉身份从日本韩国菲律宾到新西兰森林农田和大海的馈赠在微生物和益生菌的作用下被腌制保存并转化本系列探索发酵的独特魅力致敬饮食智慧文化传统与历史故事.

programme.title: 爆食姐妹 S2
programme.desc: 爆食姐妹的两位年轻主持将带你走进台湾每一个角落例如新竹基隆桃园寻找当地美食.

programme.title: 真的出现了!
programme.desc: (双声道 - 中/韩) 俊河得知世珍要嫁给泰京气得冲到公司想要和世珍理论但世珍非但不肯理会俊河还要公司的人赶走俊河.

programme.title: 真的出现了!
programme.desc: (双声道 - 中/韩) 孔宥明不敢将自己交男友的事情告诉家人但还是被家人发现她在国外和男人住在一起奶奶气得下令不让宥明出门.

programme.title: End of Transmission
programme.desc: End of Transmission.

programme.title: Warna Ramadan
programme.desc: To oat lovers, Norman Ishak shares an easy yet interesting recipe in HIDANG. GAYA offers tips for those interested in or still keeping vintage furniture at home. SEMBANG celebrates the inspiring spirit of youth volunteers, while CABAR follows Farhana and her husband completing their mission.

programme.title: Dapur Vaganza
programme.desc: Join the stars of Gegar Vaganza as they light up the kitchen, cooking, entertaining and getting ready for Ramadan while sharing laughter and stories with host Kak Lina and Tok Ram.

programme.title: Bunga Salju
programme.desc: Fatimah is thrilled at the idea of Qaisara joining Tuan Ishak's family, but Qaisara insists she wants to marry Farouk, not Azizi.

programme.title: Melur Untuk Firdaus 2
programme.desc: Following the failure of her first attempt to bring down Melur's company, Mawar meets up with Bakri to plan their next move.

programme.title: Belah Hati
programme.desc: Said explains to Shafiq about the switch and what happened between him and Manaf. He confirms the truth with a distraught Nur and insists she tells Farhan immediately. Nur promises to do that but finds it hard to talk to Farhan. Instead she writes him a letter. Shafiq's world is turned upside down. He confides in Nabila, Farhan spots them and starts a fight.

programme.title: Kemelut
programme.desc: Kemelut (Life Crisis) Kemelut is a drama series that focuses on the different life crises of an affluent Malay family of four. To the public, Rusdis family is seen as the ideal family With everyone living their own lives, they are trying to keep each other out from their affairs, brewing lies ....

programme.title: Rahasia Dan Cinta
programme.desc: Dwita, the daughter of a prominent entrepreneur finds herself caught in an arranged marriage with Greg - a match orchestrated by their fathers to merge their companies. Aware that Dwita would likely resist this plan, her father assigns her a personal bodyguard, Debu, to keep her in line. As Dwita, Greg and Deby embark on this unexpected journey together, a series of challenges and complications arise, turning Dwita's life upside down.

programme.title: Detik Semasa
programme.desc: The program analyses and dissect issues of concern to the Malay/Muslim Singaporeans - be it at the community level, national, regional or global. Apart from raising awareness, each DETIK episode hopes to set viewers thinking and make informed decisions on matters that can impact their lives.

programme.title: Sembang Sihat S3
programme.desc: Hosted by Ainon Talib and Zuhairi Idris, Sembang Sihat takes on a fresh, gripping new direction blending health education with medical mystery storytelling to create a more interactive, relatable, and engaging viewer experience.

programme.title: Cuci S2
programme.desc: A new post-trauma cleaning job turns complicated when two wives, Jun and Nora, claim the body of the same deceased each calling a different company. Afnan is shaken when he learns Husin has joined a rival cleaning company, BERSIH. Azri grows suspicious of Emma's strange behavior. A grim discovery at Mairah's office threatens to push everyone further to the edge.

programme.title: Papa Ricky
programme.desc: Zara tells Riqmal that their child has passed away, hiding the painful truth of what really happened. Meanwhile, Kathy rejects Riqmal's proposal after Alisya refuses to give her blessing.

programme.title: Warna Ramadan
programme.desc: This episode shares essential fasting health tips for expecting mothers with Dr Nurhidayati in Sembang and explores the history and evolution of the Kurta in Gaya. Not to forget the benefits of dates in Hidang Cari Makan. Plus, watch a heartwarming mother-daughter duo engage in volunteer work in Cabar.

programme.title: Dapur Vaganza
programme.desc: Join the stars of Gegar Vaganza as they light up the kitchen, cooking, entertaining and getting ready for Ramadan while sharing laughter and stories with host Kak Lina and Tok Ram.

programme.title: Bunga Salju
programme.desc: Qaisara reluctantly agrees to marry Azizi and with Ekin's guidance, begins learning how to support his autism. Meanwhile, Farouk's increasing financial desperation exposes his real reason for pushing her into the marriage.

programme.title: Berita
programme.desc: (Live) Catch the latest local and international news on Suria.

programme.title: Detik Dialog
programme.desc: A special episode of DETIK that deep dive into contemporary issues in Singapore and around the region.

programme.title: Riuh-Riuh Ramadan S3
programme.desc: The Hashims household spirals into more chaos. Kassim and Rogayah struggle with eating oats for pre dawn meal, Muna's outburst goes viral, Mahmud's manager ambitions escalate, and Rogayah's impulsive bazaar shopping turns into food wastage. Meanwhile, Kassim's livestream fame grows, inspiring Hashim to open his own social-media account. Rogayah's simple iftar unexpectedly transforms the entire living room into a full-blown themed feast.

programme.title: Andai Tiada Dia
programme.desc: Intan sets her sights on Falah. She schemes to push Suri out of the way.

programme.title: Berita
programme.desc: Catch the latest local and international news on Suria.

programme.title: End of Transmission
programme.desc: End of Transmission.

programme.title: Rusiyai Thedi Sr 4
programme.desc: Rusiyai Thedi is back with new mouth-watering segments! Join hosts Thivyaa and Kishore as they embark on this gastronomy journey. Also, there will be exclusive guests appearances, from food experts to your favorite celebrities!

programme.title: Magarantham
programme.desc: Suseela mistakes Madhan's behavior for an effort to win her over, but Madhan is actually trying to annoy her. Their misunderstanding turns into a lighthearted rivalry, filled with teasing and cat-and-mouse exchanges.

programme.title: Thayangaathey
programme.desc: Thayangaathey, is a health documentary-drama, that is centred around 13 unique case studies who suffer from chronic, life-altering diseases. The cases range from poor lifestyle choices, complacency, ignorance to complete unfortunate personals. The intent of the programme is to educate viewers of these illnesses, the symptoms to look out for, the probability of them succumbing to these illnesses, early detection and so on.

programme.title: Yaavarum Nalam
programme.desc: Yaavarum Nalam is a thrilling web series that revolves around a food delivery guy, a restaurant waitress and the son of a rich doctor whose lives turns upside down when they start receiving messages through WhatsApp?

programme.title: Suvai 3
programme.desc: The celebrity cookoff competition will see the teams of Jayasutha-Arul Ayyavoo and Indra-Vishnu Balaji pit against one another. The teams will be given rice paper as the main ingredient to work for the quarter final round. Who is going to win this time?

programme.title: Nijangal
programme.desc: This drama aims to connect with audience with current and relevant issues that they can identify with. They will be able to relate with the themes and reflect on their own lives.

programme.title: Nijangal
programme.desc: This drama aims to connect with audience with current and relevant issues that they can identify with. They will be able to relate with the themes and reflect on their own lives.

programme.title: Vaanavil
programme.desc: Vaanavil a 41 part daily soap traces the lives of five friends who meet at their varsity and are now moving on to next phase of their lives.

programme.title: Vaanavil
programme.desc: Vaanavil a 41 part daily soap traces the lives of five friends who meet at their varsity and are now moving on to next phase of their lives.

programme.title: Ethiree
programme.desc: A tale of how two unrelated couples who are initially touched by the magic of love get inadvertently included into a sinister game coordinated by some villains who are keen to satisfy their selfish needs.

programme.title: Ethiree
programme.desc: A tale of how two unrelated couples who are initially touched by the magic of love get inadvertently included into a sinister game coordinated by some villains who are keen to satisfy their selfish needs.

programme.title: Sooda Oru Coffee
programme.desc: Sooda Oru Coffee.

programme.title: Ammavin Kaipesi (2012)
programme.desc: After being accused of theft, Annamalai leaves his house. His mother Ranganayaki desperately tries contacting him using a cell phone in order to ask him to return to save their house.

programme.title: Damu's Kitchen
programme.desc: Time to deep dive into some old, lesser known recipes that have been lost in time. Learn it from Chef Damu as he unveils the treasure trove of heritage recipes in this season of Damu's Kitchen.

programme.title: Damu's Kitchen
programme.desc: Time to deep dive into some old, lesser known recipes that have been lost in time. Learn it from Chef Damu as he unveils the treasure trove of heritage recipes in this season of Damu's Kitchen.

programme.title: Magarantham
programme.desc: Suseela and Madhan complain to their friends about their rivalry. Kelvin advises Madhan to remain calm and discuss things peacefully. The next day, Madhan gets good news about his project and invites everyone to dinner to celebrate. But that night, he receives a call informing him that Malliga has been hospitalized.

programme.title: Seithi
programme.desc: (Live) Tamil Seithi focuses primarily on local and international news, information and current affairs. Catch the online news portal at http://seithi.mediacorp.sg/.

programme.title: Yaavarum Nalam
programme.desc: Yaavarum Nalam is a thrilling web series that revolves around a food delivery guy, a restaurant waitress and the son of a rich doctor whose lives turns upside down when they start receiving messages through WhatsApp?

programme.title: Rasikka Rusikka S3
programme.desc: Bala Ganapathy Williams is back with a new ride and persona in this travel foodie show that features some of the best places to get the most sought after Malaysian delicacies.

programme.title: Achamillai Manamae S2
programme.desc: Following a brazen escape from the world's most notorious prison a decade ago, a former MMA champion finds herself in the midst of turmoil again when a man rising to power seeks to destroy countless lives because of a prized dagger she swore to protect.

programme.title: YAAR 3
programme.desc: Vino finds out the truth behind Mano's bruise and doubts him even more. Suspicion draws towards Sathiesh as the police discovers the multiple protection orders filed against him. Aruna, Anjali and Mano come to a conclusion that it is high time all 5 of them met.

programme.title: Mellisai Hits S3
programme.desc: Collection of hit melody songs from 1990s - 2000s.

programme.title: Ethiroli S22
programme.desc: As Singapore moves further toward a cashless future, money has become a tap, a swipe, or a click awaymaking it easier for children and teens to spend without fully feeling the cost. Do they truly understand the value of money? This episode looks at how parents can teach saving, mindful spending, and financial responsibility in a digital-first world.

programme.title: Vedi
programme.desc: An honest police officer, Prabhakaran, puts a notorious gangster, Easwaramoorthy, behind bars. When Easwaramoorthy learns of his identity, he decides to take revenge by targeting Prabhakaran's sister.

programme.title: Headline News
programme.desc: The latest top stories of the hour.

programme.title: East Asia Tonight
programme.desc: Spotlight on East Asia, a region steeped in history and now helping to write the future of our world. We'll break down the key stories and explain why they matter.

programme.title: Besties
programme.desc: Singaporeans test AI companions in a loneliness epidemic. Can digital friends truly replace human connection?

programme.title: Singapore Tonight
programme.desc: From business to politics, health to technology, the latest news from Singapore and analysis of the impact.

programme.title: Love After 60
programme.desc: These lonely seniors, all over 60, are searching for love. But in conservative Indian society, they must defy taboos and face judgmenteven from their own families.

programme.title: Asia Tonight
programme.desc: CNA correspondents bring you the top stories of the day with 'live' reports and interviews to keep you up-to-date on the day's events.

programme.title: Money Mind
programme.desc: Money Mind is all about how to save, how to invest, and how to better spend your money. The show brings you weekly personal finance tips to help you make all the right money moves in Asia. Because, personal finance matters.

programme.title: CNA Correspondent
programme.desc: They're your eyes and ears around the globe. CNA's network of correspondents shines a light on stories from their corners of the world, from groundbreaking events to up-and-coming trends..

programme.title: Singapore Tonight
programme.desc: From business to politics, health to technology, the latest news from Singapore and analysis of the impact.

programme.desc: (Live) Top stories, business news and market updates from across the region as Asia gears up for the day ahead.

programme.title: Asia Now
programme.desc: (Live) Non-stop breaking stories, expert analysis and extensive news coverage every hour.

programme.title: Who's Driving Now?
programme.desc: The use of driverless autonomous vehicles in Singapore is being ramped up, with Punggol the next to see self-driving shuttles rolling out. But while our deployments of AVs is slowly and steadily building up, China is showing us what the possibilities are and what a driverless future could look like.

programme.title: Asia Now
programme.desc: (Live) Non-stop breaking stories, expert analysis and extensive news coverage every hour.

programme.title: On The Red Dot
programme.desc: On The Red Dot offers weekly in-depth analysis and discussion on key issues and events that matter to Singaporeans.

programme.title: Salt of the Earth
programme.desc: An ancient seaweed salt once gifted to emperors, revived on the legendary island of Awajishima.
